title: Regional API latency spike under peak checkout load
description: Synthetic probes and customer traffic reported p95 latency above SLA in EU West.

title: Delayed payment provider callback processing
description: Callback queue lag increased after deploy and required rollback plus replay.

title: Search shard imbalance after index compaction
description: Read replicas showed uneven segment placement leading to bursty query times.

title: Notification retry storm following SMTP throttling
description: Bulk notification retries saturated worker concurrency until backoff policy tuned.

title: Cache eviction regression on product detail endpoints
description: Unexpected cache churn triggered repeated DB misses during a flash sale window.
